definitions.text: To fit, as for a specific end or purpose; make suitable or comfortable; adapt; adjust.
To construct by fitting together or uniting various parts; fabricate by union of constituent parts.
To bring or put into form or order; adjust the parts or elements of; compose; contrive; plan; devise.
The structural elements of a building or other constructed object.
examples: Now that the frame is complete, we can start on the walls.

definitions.text: Anything composed of parts fitted and united together; a fabric; a structure.
